name: Baichuan 4
archDisplay: Undisclosed architecture; closed flagship with multimodal (MMMU/MMBench/MathVista) capability

price.provider: Baichuan (platform.baichuan-ai.com, blended CNY rate converted to USD)

note: Closed flagship launched with the 'Baixiaoying' AI assistant; topped SuperCLUE (80.64) above GPT-4-Turbo-0125 and Claude 3 Opus on Chinese-language tasks at release.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real: braintitan.medium.com independently corroborates May 22 2024 release date, matching record. The inf.news sourceUrl returned HTTP 403 on direct fetch, but a fresh web search that crawled the same URL surfaced the literal text 'Baichuan 4 ranked first with a score of 80.64' on that page, confirming the SuperCLUE row. Kept as-is.
